target_skill.name: brainstorm-engine
target_skill.description: Generate NEW concepts — "brainstorm", "what could I build", "crazy 8s". Not for evaluating (→ idea-scout), building (→ build), browsing (→ idea-vault), or pitching (→ pitch-crafter).

competing_skills.name: idea-scout
competing_skills.description: Score a raw idea — "scout this", "is this viable". Auto-fires on new ideas. Not for building (→ architect), saving without eval (→ idea-vault), or batch ideation (→ brainstorm-engine).

competing_skills.name: build
competing_skills.description: Write working code — "build this", "prototype this", "MVP this". Not for planning (→ architect), bugs (→ systematic-debug), deploy (→ ship-it), or testing (→ systematic-test).

competing_skills.name: idea-vault
competing_skills.description: Browse stored ideas — "show my ideas", "vault", "compare ideas", "what should I build next". Not for scouting (→ idea-scout), capture (→ grove), or calibration (→ review-panel).

competing_skills.name: pitch-crafter
competing_skills.description: Persuasive pitch docs — "one-pager", "cold email pitch", "landing page", "elevator pitch". Not for plain emails (→ email-craft), slide decks, building (→ build), or scoring (→ idea-scout).

positive_cases: Brainstorm 10 ideas for a side project I could ship in a weekend
What could I build with the Notion API that doesn't already exist?
Crazy 8s for ways to monetize my newsletter — give me eight quick directions
Rapid fire ideas for solo-founder tools — I want a lot, not a few good ones
negative_cases: Is the eBay scorer Chrome extension viable? Score it for me.
Build me a working prototype of a kitchen timer with touch-friendly buttons
What should I build next from my vault? Compare my top three ideas.
Write a one-pager pitching the Slack summarizer to angel investors
I had an idea last night: AI-powered grocery list. Scout it.
